daeva.name: The Wanton Curse
daeva.description: Cannot spend Willpower to resist a temptation tied to their Mask/Dirge Vice; obsessive desire takes over.

gangrel.name: The Savage Curse
gangrel.description: Lose 1 die from all Mental and Social pools while frenzying or when failing to resist frenzy.

mekhet.name: The Shadow Curse
mekhet.description: Suffer one extra point of aggravated damage from sunlight and fire; supernatural senses gain +2 dice to detect them.

nosferatu.name: The Lonely Curse
nosferatu.description: Inflict the Bestial Condition by mere presence; cannot take 10-again on Social rolls to make others comfortable.

ventrue.name: The Tyrant's Curse
ventrue.description: Each story, suffer one new persistent Condition reflecting cracks in the mind from feeding on power.

levels.name: Feral Whispers
levels.summary: Reflexively commune with animals.

levels.name: Obedience
levels.summary: Command an animal to obey a single complex order.

levels.name: Call of the Hunt
levels.summary: Summon nearby animals to your aid.

levels.name: Sense the Beast
levels.summary: Read the Beasts of others; gauge supernatural nature.

levels.name: Punish the Lash of Sin
levels.summary: Drive a target's Beast against them at the throat of their soul.

levels.name: Beast's Hackles
levels.summary: Reflexive supernatural intuition; danger sense.

levels.name: Uncanny Perception
levels.summary: Read auras and emotional state.

levels.name: The Spirit's Touch
levels.summary: Read the history of a touched object.

levels.name: Lay Open the Mind
levels.summary: Read surface thoughts of a target.

levels.name: Twilight Projection
levels.summary: Project your senses or astral form across distance.

levels.name: Celerity 1
levels.summary: +1 Defense and Initiative; ignite for the scene.

levels.name: Celerity 2
levels.summary: +2 Defense and Initiative.

levels.name: Celerity 3
levels.summary: +3 Defense and Initiative; extra Move action.

levels.name: Celerity 4
levels.summary: +4 Defense and Initiative.

levels.name: Celerity 5
levels.summary: +5 Defense and Initiative; preternatural speed.

dominate.name: Dominate
dominate.dicePool: Intelligence + Expression + Dominate vs Resolve + BP

levels.name: Mesmerize
levels.summary: Issue a simple command obeyed without thought.

levels.name: Iron Edict
levels.summary: Lay a standing command that endures until dawn.

levels.name: Entombed Command
levels.summary: Implant a post-hypnotic command triggered by a stimulus.

levels.name: The Forgetful Mind
levels.summary: Erase or rewrite memories.

levels.name: Possession
levels.summary: Take direct control of a target's body.

majesty.name: Majesty
majesty.dicePool: Presence + Expression + Majesty vs Composure + BP

levels.name: Awe
levels.summary: Force admiration and benefit of the doubt.

levels.name: Confidant
levels.summary: Compel intimate disclosure.

levels.name: Green Eyes
levels.summary: Inflict envy or jealousy on a witness.

levels.name: Loyalty
levels.summary: Sway a target to defend you as one of their own.

levels.name: Idol
levels.summary: Become the focus of a crowd as a single will.

nightmare.name: Nightmare
nightmare.dicePool: Presence + Intimidation + Nightmare vs Resolve + BP

levels.name: The Face of Fear
levels.summary: Become the target's worst nightmare for an instant.

levels.name: Dread Reputation
levels.summary: Amplify rumors about you into shaking dread.

levels.name: Eyes of the Beast
levels.summary: Force a victim to see the Beast staring back.

levels.name: Mortal Fear
levels.summary: Pin a target with paralyzing terror.

levels.name: The Cackle
levels.summary: Broadcast nightmare to all who can hear you.

levels.name: Touch of Shadow
levels.summary: Slip out of memory and notice.

levels.name: Cloak of Night
levels.summary: Become invisible while still.

levels.name: Familiar Stranger
levels.summary: Wear the face of a person the target knows.

levels.name: Oubliette
levels.summary: Erase yourself from a target's memory of the scene.

levels.name: The Madness of Crowds
levels.summary: Hide in plain sight in a crowd; the crowd protects you.

levels.name: Praestantia 1
levels.summary: +1 Dexterity for the scene; +1 Dex-skill cap.

levels.name: Praestantia 2
levels.summary: +2 Dexterity for the scene.

levels.name: Praestantia 3
levels.summary: +3 Dexterity for the scene.

levels.name: Praestantia 4
levels.summary: +4 Dexterity for the scene.

levels.name: Praestantia 5
levels.summary: +5 Dexterity for the scene.

levels.name: The Beast Unleashed
levels.summary: Reflexive bestial wakefulness; +2 dice to physical resistance.

levels.name: Claws of the Wild
levels.summary: Grow claws that inflict lethal damage.

levels.name: Unmarked Grave
levels.summary: Sink into and merge with raw earth.

levels.name: Aspect of the Predator
levels.summary: Take an animal form.

levels.name: Body of Spirit
levels.summary: Discorporate into mist or shadow.

levels.name: Resilience 1
levels.summary: +1 Stamina for the scene.

levels.name: Resilience 2
levels.summary: +2 Stamina for the scene.

levels.name: Resilience 3
levels.summary: +3 Stamina; downgrade incoming lethal to bashing.

levels.name: Resilience 4
levels.summary: +4 Stamina.

levels.name: Resilience 5
levels.summary: +5 Stamina; downgrade aggravated to lethal.

levels.name: Vigor 1
levels.summary: +1 Strength for the scene.

levels.name: Vigor 2
levels.summary: +2 Strength for the scene.

levels.name: Vigor 3
levels.summary: +3 Strength for the scene.

levels.name: Vigor 4
levels.summary: +4 Strength for the scene.

levels.name: Vigor 5
levels.summary: +5 Strength for the scene.

levels.name: Pangs of Proserpina
levels.summary: Inflict the pain of hunger on a target.

levels.name: Blood Scourge
levels.summary: Animate a whip of one's own blood.

levels.name: Curse of Aphrodite
levels.summary: Bind a victim with adoration.

levels.name: Touch of the Morrigan
levels.summary: Inflict spreading wounds at range.

levels.name: Theft of Vitae
levels.summary: Drain Vitae across distance.

levels.name: Vitae Reliquary
levels.summary: Sanctify a vessel to store Vitae as miracle.

levels.name: Apple of Eden
levels.summary: Create temptation that mortals cannot resist.

levels.name: Trials of Job
levels.summary: Heap supernatural misfortune on a sinner.

levels.name: Stigmata
levels.summary: Inflict (or bear) holy wounds.

levels.name: Damnation
levels.summary: Cast a soul toward final death and judgment.

bloodPotency.bloodRequired: Animal, human, or vampire blood (effectively human BP).
Human or vampire blood (animal no longer slakes).
Human blood losing efficiency; Kindred vitae slakes more.
Humans of strong Vice/Virtue, or Kindred.
Vampire vitae near-required; mortal blood barely satisfies.
Vampire preferred; must hunt Kindred or supernaturals.
Only the eldest or supernatural blood satisfies.
